node_modules/@cosmjs/proto-signing/node_.deprecated: This uses elliptic for cryptographic operations, which contains several security-relevant bugs. To what degree this affects your application is something you need to carefully investigate. See https://github.com/cosmos/cosmjs/issues/1708 for further pointers.
